title: MAGNET-seq
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3mar","text":"MAGNET-seq integrates multiplex PCR with hybrid capture for optimal enrichment of tens of target variants.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6ka8t","text":"It achieves increased on-target ratios across targets without the need for extensive primer design or balancing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"414va","text":"1. MAGNET-seq was validated using 10 ng of input DNA. A higher input amount is recommended to improve detection performance.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bvcq6","text":"2. For data processing, refer to the SPIDER-seq pipeline (Lim et al., bioRxiv, https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.11.26.625438).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":79,"length":43}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"AB0330451F3B11F0B9B50A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.11.26.625438"}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"dphqq","text":"Prepare a pooled primer mix (total 10 μM) by combining equal volumes of each target-specific primer at the same concentration.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Perform PCR according to the thermal cycling conditions outlined in the PCR program table. A B C 1 98°C 30 s 2 98°C 10 s 10 cycles 3 60°C 30 s 4 72°C 30 s 5 72°C 10 min 6 4°C hold

Prepare a 50 μl PCR reaction using the components listed in the reagent table below. Add the index PCR reagents directly to the targeted PCR amplicons without purification. A B 1 Phusion U Multiplex PCR Master Mix 25 μL 2 Nuclease-free water 15 μL 3 10μM Illumina P5 index primer 2.5 μL 4 10μM Illumina P7 index primer 2.5 μL 5 Targeted PCR amplicon 5 μL 6 Total 50 μL
Perform PCR according to the thermal cycling conditions outlined in the PCR program table. %s %s
Pool all eight index PCR amplicons (total 400 μL) into a 1.5 mL DNA LoBind tube.
Add 480 μL of Ampure XP beads (1.2X volume ratio) and mix thoroughly.
Wash the beads twice with 700 μL 80% ethanol.
Air-dry the beads for 2 minutes at room temperature.
Elute the purified DNA in 100 μL of nuclease-free water.
Incubate for 5 minutes at room temperature.
Place the tube on a magnetic stand for 2 minutes, or until the solution clears.
Remove the supernatant.
Pool multiple samples to a final volume of 50 μl.
Concentrate the DNA using the Oligo Clean & Concentrator‱ kit (Zymo Research), following the manufacturer’s instructions.
Elute the final product in 7 μl of nuclease-free water.

Perform hybrid capture using the Celemics Target Enrichment Kit (Celemics) with the whole exome sequencing panel. Incubate the hybridization reaction for 8 hours following the manufacturer's protocol.

Prepare a 100 μL PCR reaction using the components listed in the reagent table below. A B 1 2X KAPA master mix 50 μL 2 Nuclease-free water 10 μL 3 10μM P5 binding primer 5 μL 4 10μM P7 binding primer 5 μL 5 on-beads captured library 30 μL 6 Total 100 μL
Prepare a 40 μL PCR reaction mix as described in the reagent table below. Aliquot 5 μL of the master mix into each of 8 tubes for target amplification. %s %s
Perform PCR according to the thermal cycling conditions outlined in the PCR program table. %s %s
Add 120 μL of Ampure XP beads (1.2X volume ratio) and mix thoroughly.
Incubate for 5 minutes at room temperature.
Place the tube on a magnetic stand for 2 minutes, or until the solution clears.
Remove the supernatant.
Wash the beads twice with 200 μL 80% ethanol.
Air-dry the beads for 2 minutes at room temperature.
Elute the purified DNA in 60 μL of nuclease-free water.
Library quantification was performed using D1000 ScreenTape (Agilent).
creator: Taehoon Kim
